full_text:
Sun Fen (Ziyang) 孫奮 (子揚)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Fen (孫奮), styledZiyang (子揚). Son of Sun Quan. A proud prince suspected of having imperial ambitions and was executed by Sun Hao. Sun Fen was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Fen lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
